message:
fix(ufunc): reject non-finite autodetected histogram ranges in histogram and histogramdd

- Add is_finite() validation on autodetected min/max range in 1-D
  histogram, returning a ValueError when all-NaN or all-infinite input
  produces a non-finite range — previously the code would silently
  produce bins with NaN edges
- Add the same is_finite() validation to histogramdd per-dimension
  autodetected ranges, preventing non-finite edge arrays from being
  generated for any dimension

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
